title: Food Commercial Poster 2 AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: commercial food poster built around glossy strawberry cream croissant stack with fresh berries and powdered sugar. Subject: glossy strawberry cream croissant stack with fresh berries and powdered sugar is the appetizing hero subject, supported by strawberries, cream ribbons, pastry flakes, and sugar dust floating in a controlled mid-air burst and detailed food texture. Scene: warm cafe tabletop with ceramic plate, linen napkin, soft window light, and shallow depth of field provides the tabletop or studio context while keeping the food visually dominant. Composition: Fixed food-commercial composition with hero food centered, controlled ingredient motion, appetizing close detail, and clean negative space. Style: Polished food photography with glossy texture, appetizing macro detail, clean shadows, and high-end commercial finish. Color Palette: Ingredient-led colors with warm highlights, fresh accents, clean tabletop neutrals, and appetizing contrast. Lighting: Believable polished lighting with controlled highlights, readable shadows, depth, and artifact-free detail. Camera: Clean camera perspective that keeps the main subject readable and preserves the template composition. Typography: No unnecessary text; any incidental labels stay minimal, intentional, and secondary to the image. Signature Elements: glossy strawberry cream croissant stack with fresh berries and powdered sugar, strawberries, cream ribbons, pastry flakes, and sugar dust floating in a controlled mid-air burst, warm cafe tabletop with ceramic plate, linen napkin, soft window light, and shallow depth of field, and crisp laminated pastry layers, glossy fruit surfaces, cream texture, and polished commercial food detail define the reusable food-commercial mechanism. Restrictions: Keep one coherent image, concrete subject detail, readable anatomy or object structure, clean text when present, no placeholder words, no watermark, no extra unrelated elements, and no artifact-heavy output.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: commercial food poster built around matcha tiramisu cup with whipped cream, cocoa dust, and tiny chocolate leaves. Subject: matcha tiramisu cup with whipped cream, cocoa dust, and tiny chocolate leaves is the appetizing hero subject, supported by matcha powder, cream swirls, chocolate curls, and soft cake cubes suspended around the dessert and detailed food texture. Scene: minimal dessert bar counter with glass cup, matte spoon, folded napkin, and warm spotlight provides the tabletop or studio context while keeping the food visually dominant. Composition: Fixed food-commercial composition with hero food centered, controlled ingredient motion, appetizing close detail, and clean negative space. Style: Polished food photography with glossy texture, appetizing macro detail, clean shadows, and high-end commercial finish. Color Palette: Ingredient-led colors with warm highlights, fresh accents, clean tabletop neutrals, and appetizing contrast. Lighting: Believable polished lighting with controlled highlights, readable shadows, depth, and artifact-free detail. Camera: Clean camera perspective that keeps the main subject readable and preserves the template composition. Typography: No unnecessary text; any incidental labels stay minimal, intentional, and secondary to the image. Signature Elements: matcha tiramisu cup with whipped cream, cocoa dust, and tiny chocolate leaves, matcha powder, cream swirls, chocolate curls, and soft cake cubes suspended around the dessert, minimal dessert bar counter with glass cup, matte spoon, folded napkin, and warm spotlight, and velvety cream, powder texture, clean glass reflections, and appetizing macro commercial detail define the reusable food-commercial mechanism. Restrictions: Keep one coherent image, concrete subject detail, readable anatomy or object structure, clean text when present, no placeholder words, no watermark, no extra unrelated elements, and no artifact-heavy output.
